title: Reconcile orphaned bridge board fragments
description: Resolve firmware/bridge-zephyr fragments with no demonstrated canonical Zephyr board mapping: heltec_t114, heltec_vision_master_e213, heltec_vision_master_e290, heltec_wireless_tracker, lilygo_tbeam, rak19007_wisblock, seeed_t1000e, seeed_wio_tracker_1110, station_g2, and xiao_s3_wio_sx1262. Map each to a real board target and test it, or remove/replace it through an explicitly approved scope. Note that seeed_t1000e does not auto-merge for the existing t1000_e/nrf52840 target.
acceptance_criteria: Every listed fragment has a canonical build target validated by the bridge static/build checks, or is explicitly retired; stale aliases and copied pin mappings no longer masquerade as supported targets.
close_reason: Reconciled as part of project-LICHEN-io1k: 10 stale bridge fragments classified FAIL (no canonical board); comments added; docs/matrix updated with canonical selectors. All children closed under epic.
